question: Top-down realistic photograph, dark wooden tabletop with clearly visible wood grain; at the exact center of the frame are 2 laptops: the first is a silver aluminum laptop opened at approximately 110 degrees, with a black keyboard and large trackpad clearly visible; the second is a smaller dark gray matte laptop closed, placed in the upper right corner of the frame, its bottom edge parallel to and slightly overlapping the top edge of the central laptop; directly to the left of the central laptop are 3 smartphones arranged in a vertical column from top to bottom: the topmost one is an orange phone with screen facing down; the middle one is a mint green phone with screen facing up and illuminated; the bottommost one is a white ceramic-backed phone placed diagonally with its top pointing toward upper left; below the phone column near the lower left of the frame are 2 earphone charging cases placed side by side: the left one is a white plastic case half-open revealing 2 earbuds; the right one is a matte lemon yellow charging case closed tight; in the upper left corner of the frame are 2 mugs: the one on the left is a white ceramic mug with light brown coffee foam at the rim; the one on the right is a transparent glass cup with light blue coffee foam inside and condensation on the glass walls; to the right of the central laptop are 2 hardcover notebooks standing vertically: closer to the laptop is a kraft paper hardcover notebook with fine linen texture on the cover; further right is a dark green cloth-bound hardcover notebook with visible weave texture; lying horizontally on the kraft paper notebook are 3 pens arranged parallel from top to bottom: a black fountain pen with gold clip at the bottom, nib pointing right; above it are 2 short ballpoint pens in red and silver respectively, both tips pointing right; below the 2 notebooks are 2 mechanical pencils crossed: a blue mechanical pencil placed diagonally with tip pointing toward lower left; a neon purple mechanical pencil crossing from lower left to upper right with tip pointing toward lower right; between the two laptops and the notebooks are 6 USB drives spread in a fan shape: a red metal USB drive with port facing up; a silver swivel USB drive with port facing left; a mint green short fuzzy velvet-covered USB drive with port facing down; a black rubber waterproof USB drive with port facing right; a transparent crystal-shell USB drive with port facing lower left; a matte orange ultra-thin card-style USB drive with port facing upper right; at the lower right corner of the central laptop trackpad are 2 sticky notes: the bottom layer is a blank yellow sticky note, the top layer is a blank transparent frosted sticky note overlapping it; the upper right corners of both sticky notes each have 1 paper clip, red and blue respectively; on the lower left corner of the closed dark gray laptop are 2 blank light pink sticky notes placed side by side; in the upper center-right area of the frame is a small pink cactus in a terracotta pot with fine cracks; in the upper center-left area of the frame are 2 pairs of glasses side by side: one pair with round tortoiseshell frames with legs folded, beside it one pair with thin metal frames and light green tinted lenses; at the bottom center of the frame a transparent plastic ruler is placed horizontally, with gold glitter inside the ruler body; at the bottom left is a matte black pair of scissors half-open with blade tips pointing right; at the bottom right is a small black camera with lens cap attached and lens facing toward the upper left of the frame.

Top-down realistic photograph, gray-white marble countertop with fine gray veins; in the left-center of the frame a rectangular light-colored wooden cutting board with slightly worn edges, its right edge near the center line of the countertop; on the cutting board 2 knives placed horizontally: a stainless steel chef's knife below with black handle on the left and blade facing right, a shorter paring knife above with matte gray blade and white handle with blade facing left; in the center of the cutting board 3 tomatoes arranged in a row from left to right, 2 of which are light purple ripe tomatoes and 1 is a common red tomato, all three with green stems; immediately to the right of the tomatoes 2 cucumbers placed parallel: the upper one a dark green cucumber with tiny water droplets on its surface, the lower one a bright yellow cucumber, both tips pointing toward the upper right; in the lower left of the cutting board half of a cut purple onion with purple-white striped cross-section facing up and root facing left; in the lower right of the cutting board 4 peeled garlic cloves arranged side by side in light blue color with tips pointing right; to the right of the cutting board a transparent glass bowl containing 7 lemon slices spread in a fan shape with the outermost 2 slices slightly overlapping, the lemon flesh is mint green while the rind remains yellow; above the glass bowl a dark green glass olive oil bottle with a gold metal cap, the olive oil inside is light pink; to the upper right of the olive oil bottle a white cylindrical ceramic salt cellar with a slightly reflective lid; to the right of the salt cellar a dark brown wooden pepper grinder standing upright with a rounded top; in the upper left area of the frame a small potted basil plant with bright green leaves extending outward; in the lower left area of the frame 2 beige linen kitchen towels overlapped and folded into three layers with fine blue thread along the edges; to the right of the kitchen towels 2 soup spoons placed diagonally: the upper one a mirror-finish stainless steel soup spoon with handle pointing toward the lower right, the lower one a matte black soup spoon with handle pointing toward the right; in the lower right of the frame a black cast iron skillet with handle facing right and empty interior; above the skillet a white round plate containing 3 golden toasted bread slices with charred edges arranged in a slightly overlapping fan shape.

Realistic photography of a rainy night city street corner, low-angle wide shot, wet glistening road surface; in the left foreground a black metal lamp post with raindrops on its surface, emitting warm yellow light from the top; beneath the lamp post near the curb 2 fire hydrants stand side by side: the left one is common red, the right one is bright cyan blue, both with water droplet reflections; in the center a white zebra crossing cuts across the foreground, the ground reflecting the lights; to the right foreground of the zebra crossing 2 metal trash cans arranged front to back: the front one is blue with its lid half open, the back one is dark gray with its lid closed; behind the trash cans 2 taxis parked side by side at the rear edge of the zebra crossing: on the left a classic yellow taxi with its hood facing left; on the right a matte black taxi with its yellow roof sign illuminated; both cars have water streaks on their windows; in the left middle a group of three bicycles leaning against a gray parking post: the front one has a red frame with handlebars angled upper right; the middle one has a white frame with wheels turned slightly left; the rear one has a transparent acrylic frame parked in the furthest back position; in the right middle a black bus stop bench with metal frame, thin layer of water pooled on the seat; to the right of the bench 2 suitcases standing upright: a dark gray hard-shell case in front with its handle half extended; a silver soft-sided case behind with its handle fully retracted; in the upper right a set of traffic signal lights hanging on a horizontal pole, black casing, the green light lit facing toward the left side of the frame; below the signal a pedestrian crossing indicator box displaying a white walking figure icon; in the left middle a green metal newspaper box with rounded corners, door closed; in front of the newspaper box 6 shallow puddles scattered across the road surface: the largest one directly in front is elliptical, the other 5 are smaller with 2 positioned to its right and behind it, and the remaining 3 distributed to its left, at the zebra crossing edge, and in front of the trash cans, the water surfaces reflecting the taxi headlights; center-right 3 pedestrians standing at the zebra crossing edge: the one in front holding a transparent umbrella wearing a dark blue long raincoat; the one behind wearing a reflective silver raincoat with no umbrella; the leftmost person wearing a gray knit cap and black puffer jacket walking toward the right; between the 3 pedestrians 2 small dogs on thin black leashes: a brown short-haired dog with its nose pointed toward the largest puddle; a white small dog wearing a bright blue raincoat and yellow rain boots standing to the right of the brown dog; in the distant right a shop window glass emanating a pink-purple neon glow.

Realistic photo inside a classroom, frontal view, cold white daylight streaming through left-side window; in the back center of the frame a dark green chalkboard occupies the upper half, surface showing faint eraser marks and chalk dust; directly above the chalkboard center a round white wall clock with black hands; to the left of the chalkboard a tall window with light gray venetian blinds, blinds half-closed, white window frame; in the front left of the frame a light wood-colored teacher's lectern desk with smooth surface; on the right rear corner of the lectern desk 2 laptops side by side: the left one silver aluminum half-open at approximately 90 degrees with black screen; the right one fluorescent yellow-green shell laptop closed, thinner body, near desk edge; on the left side of the lectern desk 1 semi-transparent light purple projector, lens facing toward the back of the frame, internal components faintly visible through the casing; on the front left corner of the lectern desk 2 stacks of textbooks totaling 6 books: first stack 3 books with red, blue, and cream white covers; second stack 3 books with dark green, orange, and gray covers; spines aligned; between the two stacks a transparent acrylic pen holder with 7 colored pencils inserted, tips pointing up; in the front right of the frame 2 student desks side by side: left desk surface light gray, right desk surface slightly darker gray, both with rounded edges; on the upper left corner of the left desk 2 globes side by side: the front one a standard blue-green globe, the back one a globe with bright purple oceans, both with black bases and tilted axes leaning left; on the right side of the left desk 2 potted plants: one bright green ivy with leaves trailing over desk edge, another small green cactus standing in a white ceramic pot; on the center of the right desk from left to right 6 cups with straws: first a blue stainless steel cup with condensation on the wall; second a transparent plastic cup with fluorescent green beverage inside; third a matte white cup with black straw; fourth a transparent glass cup with bright purple beverage and white straw; fifth a matte black cup with fluorescent orange straw; sixth a light pink stainless steel cup with condensation on the wall and silver straw; on the front edge of the right desk 2 rulers: one transparent ruler placed horizontally, another pale yellow ruler placed slightly diagonally; at the lower right corner of each desk 1 backpack: left backpack black half-unzipped revealing orange lining, right backpack dark blue with zipper fully closed; in front of the right backpack 2 lunch boxes side by side: one red plastic lunch box tightly sealed, another dark gray metal lunch box with rounded corners.

Realistic photography of a museum exhibition hall with soft warm lighting; at the center of the frame, a rectangular glass display case with black metal frame, subtle reflections visible along the glass edges; inside the case, the bottom is lined with deep red velvet padding with visible plush texture; positioned left of center, 2 vases stand vertically: in front, a tall and slender blue-and-white porcelain vase with white base and blue patterns, glossy glaze finish; behind it, a slightly shorter and rounder vase with white base and fluorescent orange patterns in imitation blue-and-white style, positioned near the left back corner; a small gap separates the two vases; to the right of the vases, 2 bronze daggers lie flat on their individual black stands: the upper dagger has green patina on the blade with the tip pointing right; the lower dagger has a bright blue sheath with the tip pointing left; in front of the daggers, 7 ancient coins are scattered across 3 small transparent display trays, with 2 coins slightly overlapping on the edge of the same tray, the coins are predominantly gold-colored, with the rightmost coin displaying rainbow oxidation colors; positioned right of center, 2 carved stone tablets stand upright: the front one is a gray stone slab with chipped edges, the back one is a light blue-gray stone slab slightly tilted with fine carved texture; below the 2 stone tablets, 3 ammonite fossils rest on individual small black bases: the left one is light brown in natural color, the 2 on the right are dyed mint green with clear spiral patterns; on the left inner side near the glass and on the right inner side near the glass, 1 transparent acrylic information card each, placed symmetrically; outside the case in front, 1 silver metal stanchion pole on the left and 1 on the right, each topped with a round ball, connected by 1 fluorescent yellow-green rope forming an arc; in the upper right corner of the frame, a white dome-shaped security camera is mounted on the ceiling edge, its lens directed toward the display case; in the upper left of the frame, a black track spotlight casts focused light, with the light spot falling on the upper half of the front vase; on the right wall, a brass wall sconce with a milky white shade emits soft light; dark wood flooring with a clear reflection directly beneath the display case.

Realistic sunny beach photography, slightly tilted overhead view, fine sand grains clearly visible; top left of the frame 2 beach umbrellas stuck in the sand: the one on the left has a red and white striped canopy, the one on the right has a matte black canopy, both umbrella poles tilt slightly to the right casting shadows; below the umbrellas 2 towels laid flat: a sky blue towel with white fringe on the left, a bright orange fine velvet towel on the right, edges of both towels slightly overlapping; to the left of the towels 2 pairs of flip-flops side by side: one pair black, one pair white, both straps covered in fine sand; to the right of the towels a white hard-shell cooler half-open, lid raised approximately 45 degrees, 2 fluorescent pink ice packs visible inside; in front of the cooler 7 water bottles standing on the sand, 4 are transparent plastic bottles, 1 is a semi-transparent milky white bottle, the other 2 are also transparent plastic bottles, all bottles have water droplets on them, all 7 arranged in an arc from left to right; to the right of the water bottles 3 sunscreen bottles standing upright: 2 are common orange frosted bottles, 1 is a dark blue bottle with a silver pump head; in front of the sunscreens 2 pairs of sunglasses with lenses facing up: one pair with dark brown lenses and thin metal frame on the left, another pair with bright green mirrored reflective lenses on the right; above the towels slightly to the right 2 kraft paper sandwich boxes closed, rounded corners, 1 box has a small white round sticker on the lid; to the right of the sandwich boxes 6 bananas scattered: 4 are common yellow, the other 2 are purple bananas, all curved in different directions; center-bottom of the frame 2 books: one white cover paperback lying open with pages gently lifted by the sea breeze, another black cover book closed placed on its right; bottom right 2 buckets near the sandcastle area: one red plastic bucket turned upside down with mouth facing down, one transparent plastic bucket with embedded silver glitter standing upright with mouth facing up; in front of the 2 buckets 2 small shovels placed crosswise: one yellow, one teal, both handles pointing left; far right of the frame near the waterline 3 white and gray seagulls standing in a row, all beaks facing left.

Sci-fi laboratory in realistic style, clean cool-toned lighting, two-thirds overhead view; in the center of the frame a silver-gray metal lab bench with fine brushed texture on the surface; from the back left corner of the bench extend 2 robotic arms: the one closer to the viewer has white casing with faux wood grain texture on joint covers, gripper open facing the center of the table; the one further back has dark gray casing with prominent black rubber rings at the joints, gripper half-closed; between the two robotic arms float 2 holographic cubes: the left one is a blue semi-transparent glowing cube, the right one is a bright orange semi-transparent cube, both with glowing halos at their edges; at the back right of the bench a black and white microscope with eyepiece facing upper left and a heavy base; in front of the microscope a transparent test tube rack holding 6 test tubes arranged neatly from left to right: tube 1 contains bright green liquid, tube 2 contains metallic silver opaque liquid, tube 3 contains purple liquid, tube 4 contains colorless transparent liquid, tube 5 contains orange liquid, tube 6 contains sky blue liquid, all 6 test tubes have small silver caps; to the left of the test tube rack 2 wide-mouth glass beakers placed front and back: the front beaker contains a small amount of colorless liquid with graduation lines on the wall, the back beaker is empty but has water droplets on the wall; in front of the beakers a pair of safety goggles placed upside down with light pink lenses showing cool light reflections; to the right of the goggles 6 latex gloves laid flat in 3 pairs: one white pair, one black pair, and one bright yellow pair, all fingers pointing right; at the front right corner of the bench 2 circuit boards side by side: the left one is a standard green PCB, the right one is a semi-transparent resin substrate circuit board with clear gold traces and black chips; above the two circuit boards 2 screwdrivers placed diagonally: one red and black, one blue and black, both metal tips pointing upper left; to the right of the circuit boards a black battery pack with yellow warning stripes on the surface; in front of the battery pack a small gray quadcopter drone resting on the table with 4 rotors folded; at the front left corner of the bench 2 tablet devices side by side: the left one with screen lit showing a light blue interface, the right one with screen off showing dark gray reflection; behind the tablet devices a small white desk lamp with head pointing down illuminating the beaker area.

Realistic morning garden photography, soft natural light, frontal view; in the center of the frame a round stone birdbath, light gray, with water droplets on the rim, gentle ripples on the water surface; 5 small birds perched on the birdbath edge distributed from left to right: leftmost a brownish-gray sparrow with head slightly tilted down toward the water; to its right a small sparrow with bright green feathers; on the right side of the basin a golden canary with fluffy feathers facing left; on the back edge a bright blue small bird with wings half-spread; rightmost a grayish-white small bird with tail feathers tilted upward; on the sandy ground in front of the birdbath 2 watering cans side by side: on the left a red metal watering can with slender spout pointing right; on the right a matte purple metal watering can with spout pointing upper left; to the right of the watering cans a green garden hose coiled in a circle, hose end pointing lower left; in the lower left corner 2 pairs of gardening gloves stacked in two piles: one pair brown leather with wrinkles, another pair transparent PVC gloves placed on top; above the gloves a wooden-handled shovel leaning against the flower bed edge, black shovel head pointing down, wooden handle pointing upper right; in the center-left a green wheelbarrow parked on the grass, empty cart, wheel facing right; behind the wheelbarrow a white wooden fence spanning the background, paint slightly peeling; in the center-right a dark wood-toned bench with dew on the seat; on the ground to the left of the bench an orange and white cat lying down, tail curled, gaze toward the birdbath; to the right of the bench 6 black garden lanterns standing on short posts, arranged in two columns of 3 each, frosted glass shades; in the right foreground a terracotta pot with a sunflower, dark black center disk, yellow petals, flower head facing upper left; behind the sunflower pot another blue pot with a cluster of lavender, pure white flower spikes, slender spikes spreading outward; in the upper right of the frame 2 orange and black butterflies hovering in mid-air in front of the lavender spikes, wings spread.

Underwater coral reef in realistic style, crystal clear seawater, wide-angle shot; in the left foreground 2 divers swimming horizontally toward the right: the front diver wearing a black wetsuit with a lime green tank on their back and a dimly lit headlamp; the rear diver wearing a bright pink wetsuit with a yellow tank, positioned further away and slightly out of focus; in front of each diver is 1 black underwater camera: the front camera has a transparent waterproof housing with lens pointing toward lower right, the rear camera lens pointing toward the center of the frame; 2 streams of bubbles rising from the 2 divers' regulators, bubbles varying in size and drifting toward upper right; in the center of the frame 2 sea turtles swimming from right to left: the one in front has a light purple shell with pale markings, the one behind has an olive green shell, maintaining some distance between the two turtles; below the turtles 3 blue and yellow angelfish swimming right in a small formation with semi-transparent fins; to the lower left of the turtles 7 clownfish surrounding a sea anemone: 3 with classic orange and white stripes, 2 darker blackish clownfish, and 2 smaller orange and white striped juveniles, all 7 positioned at staggered heights; in the lower right corner 2 starfish resting on light-colored sandy bottom: one common red and one pure white starfish, both with five complete arms; to the left of the starfish 2 small crabs peeking out from coral crevices with dark brown carapaces and antennae pointing forward; at the bottom center a cluster of red branching coral extending upward with rounded tips; to the right of the red coral a cluster of purple brain coral in a spherical shape with prominent surface grooves; above the purple brain coral 2 sea anemones with tentacles spread open: the left anemone is light green, the right anemone has bright yellow tentacles; in the lower left a patch of dark green seagrass bending right with the current; in the right middle a gray stingray gliding close to the seabed with a long thin tail pointing right; in the distant background to the upper left a shipwreck wooden plank debris half-buried in sand with rough wood grain texture.

Realistic photography of a winter train station platform, cold color tones, horizontal composition; on the left side of the frame a silver-gray train is stopped at the platform, fine snow specks on its body, doors closed, windows slightly fogged; to the right of the train the platform ground has a distinct light gray cement texture, a bright cyan-green safety line runs through the foreground near the edge, thin frost on the safety line surface; in the center of the frame a dark blue metal bench with a layer of fine frost on the seat; at the left end of the bench 3 suitcases arranged front to back: the foremost one is a transparent hard-shell suitcase with the empty interior faintly visible inside; behind it 2 hard-shell cases in dark gray and black respectively with scratches on their surfaces, all 3 suitcases standing upright with the dark gray one having its telescopic handle fully extended; on the right side of the bench near the legs 2 backpacks lying flat: one black backpack with half-open zipper revealing orange lining, another khaki backpack with zipper fully closed; on the ground in front of the bench 3 paper coffee cups arranged in a triangle: the left one a white paper cup with black lid, the right one a mirror-silver paper cup, the middle one a dark brown paper cup with white lid, all cups with light steam rising from the openings; to the right of the paper cups 2 newspapers spread on the ground: one common gray-white newsprint, another light blue paper; in the right-center of the frame a red vending machine placed against the wall with buttons and product slots visible; on the wall to the left of the vending machine an electronic timetable screen displaying several colored rectangular bars; below the timetable a black cylindrical trash bin with plastic liner at the opening; in the right foreground 2 blank poster frames arranged vertically with silver frames and solid-color poster content; slightly right of center 2 adults standing behind the bench: one wearing a dark green coat with a cream-white long scarf facing left, another wearing a gray down jacket with a black hat facing the train; beside the adults 2 children standing inside the safety line: one wearing a bright red down jacket with a blue knit cap looking up at the train, another wearing a dark blue jacket with white earmuffs; behind and to the right of the children a gray baby stroller parked with canopy half-closed; in the lower right corner of the frame 7 pigeons standing inside the safety line: 2 gray, 1 light pink pigeon, the other 4 gray-and-white patterned, all heads facing toward the paper cups; at the far right background the platform exit with falling snow and blurry city lights visible.

Realistic photo of a small bathroom, overhead slightly tilted angle, cold white ceiling light; on the right side of the frame a white enamel bathtub positioned vertically occupying the right half, inside the bathtub bottom 1 dark gray non-slip mat with fine raised dots and rounded corners; along the upper edge of the bathtub near the upper right corner 7 rubber ducks arranged in a vertical column from top to bottom with slightly tight spacing: 5 bright yellow, 1 matte black, 1 completely transparent, all 7 duck beaks facing left; on the wall upper left of the bathtub 1 silver showerhead facing downward, water stain reflections on the round disc edge; hanging on the left side of the bathtub 1 light pink velvet shower curtain, the curtain hem stopping approximately 5cm above the bathtub edge with velvet texture shadows on the fabric; on the floor below outside the bathtub 3 towels arranged in a fan shape with slight overlap: grass green on top layer, dark blue in middle layer, white on bottom layer, towel edges with short fuzz and lower left corner curled up; on the left side of the frame 1 white ceramic sink, silver faucet pointing right, some water stains on the sink edge; along the right edge of the sink 3 pump-style hand soap bottles side by side, bottle bodies respectively transparent, frosted milky white, and light gray, all pump heads white, the transparent bottle containing purple gel with gold glitter flakes; above the sink 1 rectangular mirror, four corners slightly fogged with center clearly reflective; in the lower center area of the frame 2 hair dryers: left one matte white shell with black nozzle pointing lower right; right one transparent acrylic shell with internal structure faintly visible and nozzle pointing left; both hair dryer cords coiled in tight circles and partially overlapping; above the hair dryers 3 combs/brushes arranged in a row from left to right: 1 light wood-colored wooden handle round brush with dark brown bristles, 1 black wide-tooth comb, 1 silver fine-tooth metal comb, all teeth pointing upward; in the lower left corner 1 stack of 2 folded white bath towels with neat edges forming a square block; center-left of the frame 1 orange short-haired cat sitting beside the bath towels, tail wrapped around to the front and ears facing toward the bathtub; lower right of the frame 1 small white curly-haired dog standing on the grass green towel, head facing the bathtub; in front right of the small dog 1 stainless steel water bowl half full, water surface with fine highlight reflections.

Realistic photo of dusk mountain camping, wide angle; right-center of frame 1 khaki tent with door flap rolled halfway up to the left; inside tent toward the back 2 sleeping bags side by side: left side 1 dark blue sleeping bag with regular quilted surface, right side 1 metallic silver reflective thermal sleeping bag with obvious wrinkles; beneath the two sleeping bags 2 silver-gray inflatable sleeping pads side by side, edges slightly puffed and parallel to tent opening direction; left front of tent near ground 3 hiking backpacks leaning diagonally: 1 red backpack at the very front, 1 black backpack behind it, 1 plastic backpack at the furthest back position, all three backpacks with shoulder straps hanging down to ground; above tent entrance 2 camping lanterns hanging: left side 1 black-bodied lantern with warm light pointing down, right side 1 small gray-bodied lantern with cool light pointing down, about a palm's width apart; left of center 1 circle of gray stones forming a campfire ring, flames inside bright green illuminating inner sides of stones; above campfire ring spanning 1 matte black metal tripod, three legs landing at three points on stone circle at equal distances; center of tripod hanging 1 matte black kettle, handle upright, spout facing right; right side of campfire ring 6 thin firewood pieces stacked neatly in two layers alternating top and bottom, light brown bark with cut ends facing camera; in front of campfire ring 4 white enamel cups placed horizontally in a row, thin blue rim on cup mouths, all 4 cup handles facing right; in front of cups 3 wooden skewers with marshmallows: left skewer marshmallow slightly charred, center marshmallow bright blue, right skewer marshmallow golden yellow, all three wooden skewer tips pointing to lower left; lower left of frame on ground 1 map spread open with obvious fold creases, yellowish paper, upper right corner of map weighted by 1 brass compass with round reflective glass face; upper left of map 1 pair of binoculars resting on a rock, binocular shell semi-transparent acrylic material with lens tubes pointing toward upper right of frame; lower right of frame near tent entrance 2 pairs of brown hiking boots side by side, mud spots on uppers, all toe tips facing left; right of hiking boots 2 trekking poles crossed on ground, carbon fiber black shafts, gray handles, wrist straps hanging naturally.

Realistic photo of an art studio, natural light from the window; in the center of the frame 1 light wood-colored easel standing upright, holding 1 vertical canvas, the canvas is pure white with no pattern and stretched staple marks visible at the edges; to the left of the canvas 1 black metal clamp lamp clamped on the table edge, lamp head angled toward the upper part of the canvas creating hard shadows; on the tabletop in front of the easel at center 1 oval wooden palette with dried paint cracks and scratches on the surface; to the right of the palette 6 paint tubes lying flat in a row from left to right: red, blue, yellow, white, green, black, metal tube bodies slightly wrinkled and all tube openings facing right; to the left of the palette 1 transparent glass water jar, liquid inside has a metallic silver texture, water level about half with water marks on the jar walls; behind the water jar 1 white ceramic brush cup, 7 paintbrush wooden handles visible at the cup opening, brush bristles of varying shades and brush heads pointing upward; in front of the water jar 2 fine-tipped brushes placed diagonally, black brush tips both pointing toward the lower left and the two brushes parallel to each other; to the lower right of the fine brushes 1 linen rag crumpled into a ball, off-white base with multicolored paint stains; at the front left of the tabletop 2 plain sketchbooks lying open, the left one closer to the lower left of the frame with slightly curled page corners, the right one slightly offset to the upper right, all pages blank; between the two sketchbooks 3 graphite pencils placed horizontally, pencil barrels in gray, dark green, and natural wood color respectively, all tips pointing right; below the pencils 2 erasers placed side by side: the left one is a standard white eraser, the right one is a pink eraser with obvious edge refraction; to the right of the erasers 2 rolls of tape standing upright: 1 roll of beige masking tape and 1 roll of rainbow holographic tape, both roll holes facing the camera; at the right rear of the easel 1 black plaster bust figurine, face turned toward the left of the frame with obvious highlight on the nose bridge; at the left rear of the easel 1 ochre terracotta vase, vase body with fine texture, 7 daisies inserted in the vase, flower stems crossing at the vase opening, daisy petals are pure black with yellowish centers; at the right front of the easel 1 transparent glass fruit bowl, with 4 green pears inside, pear skins with small speckles and touching each other; at the lower left corner of the frame 1 light wood-colored round stool close to the outside edge of the table, with clear wear marks on the seat surface.

Realistic photography of a concert hall stage, viewed from directly in front of the audience seats; in the center foreground 1 dark wooden conductor's podium with narrow metal trim along the edges; on the podium 2 conductor's batons placed diagonally: 1 standard white baton with its tip pointing toward the upper right, another ceramic baton placed parallel to it; on the left side of the frame 1 black grand piano with the lid open forming a triangular shape, the string area facing toward center stage with reflective lacquer finish; in front of the piano 1 black piano bench with slightly reflective leather seat aligned with the piano keyboard; in the front-center of the stage 3 violins resting on the seats of 3 black chairs: the left violin has dark brown wood grain with its scroll pointing lower left; the middle violin has a bright cyan-blue lacquered finish with its scroll pointing lower right; the right violin is warm brown with its scroll pointing lower right, all three violins evenly spaced; in the center-right 2 cellos leaning against chair backs: the front cello has standard warm brown wood grain, the rear cello has a green metallic body, both with endpins touching the floor; in the right rear of the frame 1 double bass standing upright on a stand, dark brown body with its scroll near the upper right; in the center stage area near the back of the conductor's podium 2 flutes placed horizontally on a music stand tray: 1 silver metal flute with reflective keys and opening facing left; 1 pure white ceramic-textured flute placed behind it, also with opening facing left; below the flutes 2 black clarinets resting on two chair seats, silver keys clearly visible with bells both facing lower right; in the center-left 1 golden trumpet resting on a black stand, bell facing toward the left of the frame with prominent edge highlights; in the left rear 3 timpani drums arranged in a row, copper-colored bodies with pale beige drumheads, the middle drum has a pink drumhead, all three drums arranged in an arc around the rear of the stage; in the center-rear area 7 black music stands arranged in a semicircle with even spacing, each holding 1 pure white sheet of music paper; the background features a full deep red velvet curtain hanging down with folds running from top to bottom; in the upper right of the frame 2 track spotlights shining downward, light pools falling near the conductor's podium and the middle violin; in the foreground slightly to the right 1 black microphone stand standing vertically, with a small black windscreen at the top positioned in front of the conductor's podium.

Realistic photo of an airport security checkpoint area, cold white overhead lights; on the left side of the frame 1 light gray X-ray machine with a black rectangular opening at the mouth with reflective edges; a black conveyor belt extends from right to left toward the X-ray machine, the belt surface has subtle rubber texture; in the middle background 1 metal security gate frame stands upright, silver surface is reflective and positioned at the center line behind the conveyor belt; in front of the security gate 1 silver stanchion post on each side totaling 2, with round caps on top, connected by 1 black and white striped retractable belt forming a horizontal line; on the right side of the conveyor belt 5 light gray plastic trays are arranged in sequence along the conveyor belt direction, the leftmost tray is already close to the X-ray machine entrance; Realistic photography of a natural history museum hall, wide-angle low-angle upward shot; soft light filtering through a skylight in the ceiling combined with warm-toned spotlights; at the center of the frame, a large dinosaur skeleton exhibit dominates the main visual, the skeleton spans from left to right across the frame, with the skull positioned in the upper right with jaws open, rib arcs clearly defined and the spine highlighted by multiple spotlights; two rib sections in the middle of the skeleton are made of semi-transparent acrylic material, displaying cool white luminous edges under the lighting; below the skeleton, the floor is light-colored stone, reflecting faint images of the skeleton and spotlights; around the skeleton, black stanchion posts form a barrier, thin black ropes connecting the posts to create a rectangular boundary, one side of the barrier features a low transparent panel with prominent reflections; inside the barrier on the left, an exhibit information placard stands tilted on a support stand, the placard face is a solid color block; on the left side of the frame, a glass display case contains several rock fossils and a bone fragment piece arranged neatly; on the right side of the frame, a set of tiered seating benches for visitors, dark gray with matte surfaces, beside the benches an interactive screen stands on a support bracket, the screen pure black and unlit; in the foreground lower left, three visitors enter the frame from behind: one adult wearing a dark coat standing and looking up at the skeleton, another child wearing a light-colored hat half-crouching outside the barrier, a third adult pushing a stroller stopped beside the seating benches; above, seven track spotlights distributed along ceiling beams, creating multiple light spots on the skeleton's spine and skull areas; the hall's background wall is light beige with an arched structure.

In the foreground center is a long wooden dining table covered with a dark red checkered tablecloth. On the table from left to right are: a plate of golden fried chicken legs (six pieces stacked), a bowl of steaming white rice, a large plate of dark red spicy crayfish piled into a small mountain shape (approximately fifteen), three small blue-and-white porcelain patterned dishes containing different colored sauces (dark brown soy sauce, emerald green wasabi, bright red chili sauce), two transparent glass cups filled with orange juice, an unopened dark green glass bottle of beer, a bowl of purple cold eggplant salad, and a white porcelain rectangular plate holding eight golden pan-fried dumplings. In the left foreground, a bearded male blacksmith wearing a black leather apron and clear safety goggles is bending over a dark gray cast iron anvil, swinging a hammer with his right hand raised high gripping a blackened iron hammer, while his left hand uses tongs to hold a glowing red-hot metal bar, sending over a dozen bright orange-yellow sparks flying outward. On the ground in the right foreground lies a cluttered arrangement of a bucket of gray-black quenching water, three semi-finished iron door handles with varying degrees of curvature, six forged black horseshoes, a pile of approximately twenty scattered iron nails, and two pairs of iron tongs of different sizes. The middle ground shows three interior walls of the blacksmith shop: on the left, a smoke-blackened brick wall with iron hooks holding a row of twelve hammers, tongs, and chisels of varying sizes arranged from largest to smallest; directly ahead, a forge built with red refractory bricks with orange-red flames shooting from the furnace opening and several white-hot pieces of metal visible inside the chamber, beside it an old-fashioned hand-cranked bellows connected to a black iron pipe, and above the forge a black sheet-metal exhaust hood made glossy by heat and soot; on the right wall leans a rust-covered brown wooden shelf divided into four tiers, filled with finished ironwork pieces—candlesticks, plant stands, hinges, iron rings, door latches, and more totaling no fewer than fifteen items. A slightly elevated angle shot of a multi-purpose sports stadium. The foreground features a lush green soccer field with white boundary lines, center circle, and penalty arc clearly visible. The foreground is a vast golden ripe wheat field, with plump wheat ears hanging low and gently swaying in the breeze. In the right middle ground runs a muddy yellowish-brown dirt road, with a dark green agricultural three-wheeled truck parked on it, its cargo bed filled with golden wheat grains half-covered by grayish-white canvas. Beside the truck, two young men in blue coarse cotton short-sleeved shirts are working together to hoist a bulging white woven sack onto the truck bed, with seven or eight similar woven sacks piled on the ground. In the distant background stands a row of approximately six or seven low earth-yellow farmhouses with dark red clay tile roofs, with a large patch of golden grain spread out to dry on the threshing floor in front of them. The sky is a deep azure blue with a few fluffy cumulus clouds drifting across, and a brown eagle soars circling high above.

In the foreground center is a circular cobblestone fountain pool approximately five meters in diameter, the water crystal clear revealing many scattered gold and silver wishing coins on the bottom, with seven or eight oval emerald-green lily pads and three pink-white water lilies floating on the surface; at the center of the fountain stands a two-meter-tall bronze dolphin sculpture, three water jets spraying from the dolphin's mouth and tail in parabolic arcs crossing and splashing into the pool creating a fine mist. In the foreground left, a balding middle-aged man wearing a gray suit and holding a black briefcase walks past the fountain while looking down at his phone; in the foreground right, two little girls wearing pale yellow and mint green dresses respectively lean over the fountain pool edge reaching their hands toward the water, behind them stands a mother wearing a white sun-protection jacket and sunglasses with hands on hips smiling as she watches them. The midground is a pedestrian plaza paved with dark red brick, featuring six deep green boxwood trees trimmed into spherical shapes, each tree surrounded by a ring of light gray stone benches, with at least eight or nine pedestrians sitting on various benches—an elderly man reading a newspaper, an office worker eating a sandwich, a young father soothing a baby in a stroller. A young man wearing a red baseball cap pushes a white ice cream cart stopped in the center of the plaza, the cart body displaying colorful menu stickers reading "Vanilla/Chocolate/Strawberry $5", with three children queuing to buy. At the plaza edge are four cylindrical dark green cast iron trash bins and two rows of rectangular wooden planters filled with red petunias and white baby's breath. The background features a neoclassical off-white stone building with six Corinthian columns at the front, a dark blue flag with a gold heraldic shield hanging between the columns, golden letters above the main entrance reading "MUNICIPAL CULTURAL CENTER", flanked on each side by a white marble lion statue standing guard; the relief sculpture on the triangular pediment above is faintly visible. In the foreground bottom is a weathered light-brown wooden boardwalk approximately five feet wide. On the right foreground, a young man wearing an orange-red windbreaker and carrying a dark-green large hiking backpack is gripping the railing and looking back toward the camera. The foreground bottom is a stretch of light-colored fine sandy beach, with seven or eight seashells scattered on the sand surface—white scallop shells, pink spiral conch shells, and grey clam shells of varying sizes. The sky is pure azure blue with a few wisps of white cirrus clouds, and in the upper left corner a flock of about six or seven white seagulls soar past with wings spread.

Realistic photography, high detail, top-down angle, archaeological restoration laboratory, distinct foreground/midground/background layers. In the center foreground is a damaged blue-and-white porcelain plate (white base with blue patterns, irregular chips, fine cracks across the surface), surrounded by 12 ceramic shards arranged clockwise (each with jagged edges, small white stickers numbered 01-12), where shards 03 and 04 overlap with 04 covering a corner of 03, shard 07 leans vertically against a gray foam block, and shard 11 is half-covered by the plate rim's shadow; on the left foreground a row of 6 fine brushes (from thick to thin, wooden handles in varying shades) placed parallel, the thinnest brush tip pointing toward the plate center; below the brushes is a stainless steel tray containing 3 cotton swabs, 2 disposable blades, 1 eraser (stamped "2B"), with the tray edge reflection cutting highlight lines across them; on the right foreground an electronic scale (black panel) displays "125.0g", a semi-transparent weighing boat sits on the scale containing white powder, the scale's front edge has a label reading "CAL"; beside the scale 2 tweezers (one curved-tip, one straight-tip) crossed, the curved tweezers pressing down on the straight tweezers' tip. In the midground along the back edge of the table are 6 transparent evidence bags (red seal tape) with labels reading "E1" through "E6" respectively, bag E3 contains 2 copper coins, bag E4 contains a black USB drive, bag E6 contains a small glass bottle; behind the evidence bags a ring magnifying lamp casts a circular highlight; in the midground are 3 people: a restorer wearing blue nitrile gloves holding ceramic shard 08 with their left hand, an assistant in a white lab coat holding a clipboard (titled: "RESTORATION LOG") standing on the right, a photographer holding a camera on the left with the lens aimed at the plate surface, the photographer's shoulder partially obscuring the magnifying lamp stand. The background features metal shelving with 4 kraft paper archive boxes (sides printed "FRAGILE") and a row of glass reagent bottles (at least 8, brown and clear alternating), a whiteboard on the wall reads: "Project A, Steps 1-3", a digital clock in the corner displays "14:20".
